FINDING: services/api/src/brDeck/redisRateLimit.ts:248:BLOCKING
WHAT: raw `DECR` on a key that doesn't exist creates it at `-1`. when `increment()` is called next, it sees the counter below the window floor
EVIDENCE: redisRateLimit.ts:248
IMPACT: rate limit bypass
OPTIONS:
1. lua script
UNVERIFIABLE: no
